name: Orb Hunter
short_description: In a world filled with darkness, orbs infused from darkness are spread around the world. You are an Orb Hunter and orb hunting you do. Join us in a Third-Person Dark Fantasy Action Game, and lets find gold and glory.
detailed_description:
ORB HUNTER

In a world filled with darkness, orbs infused from darkness are spread around the world,
orbs became the main source of power, sought by kings and mercenaries around the world.

Orb hunt became a good source of gold, orb hunters and orb hunt clans spread around the world.

You are an Orb Hunter of the orb hunt clan West Hunters, you are assigned a job to retrieve a fire orb, heard to exist in the valley keep.
Join our clan, hunter! and lets find gold and glory.


What To Expect (might include spoilers)
* 60-120 minutes of gameplay.
* 2 orbs to collect and use.
* treasures to find and collect.
* a whole keep you can explore and unlock doors, no loading screens.
* 3 types of weapons and skills.
* Difficulty 8 out of 10, it lies in discovering and exploring the area, and dealing with enemies.

Please check the Manual in the store page to know more about the objectives, controls and tips.

About Game Development
I’m Saud Alomari, I’m a passionate game developer, I’ve been hobby programming and developing with Unity for more than 5 years, and Orb Hunter is my serious project that put my skills in use and I would love to present it to you.
I started developing this game on October 2022.
Please contact me if you have any questions or feedback, I’d be glad to communicate with you.
